cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Wellbeing
cards.body: Family estrangement exists on a continuum rather than as a binary situation. Research shows mixed effects on wellbeing, with support playing a crucial role regardless of reconciliation goals.

cards.title: Caregiving as Bonding With Stepchildren
cards.body: Stepparents can strengthen relationships through active caregiving and nurturing support. Focusing on giving care helps build meaningful bonds with stepchildren.

cards.title: When Children Are Expected to Be Adults
cards.body: Some children are forced to suppress their own pain and take on adult responsibilities prematurely. This dynamic has lasting psychological effects on their development.

cards.title: Childcare Affordability and Government Support
cards.body: Government spending on childcare support aims to help families, but hidden charges may limit benefits. Addressing profiteering ensures families get full value from assistance programs.

cards.title: How Happy Couples Spend Weekends
cards.body: Research reveals specific weekend activities that keep partnerships strong. Regular shared time strengthens emotional connection and relationship satisfaction.

cards.title: Emotional Safety and Vulnerability in Parenting
cards.body: Emotional safety allows vulnerability to become a strength rather than weakness. True openness depends on appropriate boundaries and timing within family relationships.
